rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Demurrer And Demurrer To Petition To Determine Right To Title And Possession Of Trust Property; Petition On Rejected Creditors Claims For Transfer And Conveyance Of Trust Property
rulings.Rulings: This tenative ruling is posted late, at 3:33 pm Demurrer to First, Second, Third, and Fourth cause of action is sustained with leave to amend Any party wishing to contest this tentative ruling by appearing at the scheduled hearing must so advise the courtroom clerk (415-551-3702) and opposing parties no later than 4:00 p.m. Wednesday, May 30, 2018.
